title: cleistogenes thoroldii
intro: Cleistogenes thoroldii, also known as Thorold's grass, is a species of grass native to the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cleistogenes thoroldii include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Cleistogenes thoroldii are commonly made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
